content: When drift is found that tooling should have caught, the fix is rule-level, not instance-level: add a numbered rule to admin/validate-ship-page.sh (and a pre-commit hook where relevant), then fix the instances. Operator verbatim: 'why didn't the validator catch and alert us to this?!' Rules #1500-#1506 all originated this way. An instance fix without a guardrail is incomplete work.
